## Context
Brief description of the research question and data needs.

## Data sources identified

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Data is saved in `data/raw/` with clear naming convention
- [ ] Data dictionary is created in `docs/data_dictionary.md`
- [ ] At least one data validation check passes (e.g., row count, value range)

## Out of scope
List what is NOT included in this issue.

## Verification
